Audit this pull request for overclaims.

- original positive problem solved;
- all-alpha theorem proved;
- finite-type theorem unconditional;
- RBDH/CPC/AU^3 proved without proof;
- Sigma_w(d,h)=kappa_w(d)^2 pointwise;
